name: medicare
description: MediCare — hospital portal with role-based access (patient/admin), slot-based booking, and a keyless drug-info lookup (RxNav + openFDA). MERN, 2021–2022 stack.

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run server" "npm run client"
